case_title: TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION VS. TED CLAUDAT et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF ERNEST I. KNOWLES RE: CCP 585(D) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CLAUDAT, TED IND AND DBA THE BIGG COMPANY
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-20-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT ENTER. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT CLAUDAT, TED IND AND DBA THE BIGG COMPANY DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-20-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-21-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-05-2002
DECLARATION OF ROGER GUERTIN RE: ORIGINAL AGREEMENT (EVID CODE 1521,1550) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION
DECLARATION OF LAUDEL VILLANUEVA RE: EQUIPMENT VALUATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION

CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CLAUDAT, TED IND AND DBA THE BIGG COMPANY POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $21,767.90 DAMAGES, $2,525.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $646.64 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $24,939.54, COSTS INCLUDES $500.64 INTEREST; SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH FOR THE DESCRIPTION AND PROPERTY VALUE OF THE EQUIPMENT

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED REMAINING AMOUNT TO SATISFY THIS WRIT IS $26,760.34 AS TO DEFENDANT CLAUDAT, TED IND AND DBA THE BIGG COMPANY
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION SERVED SEP-14-2002, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CLAUDAT, TED IND AND DBA THE BIGG COMPANY
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $146.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT CLAUDAT, TED IND AND DBA THE BIGG COMPANY
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CLAUDAT, TED IND AND DBA THE BIGG COMPANY
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION
